overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a horror game showing a character exploring dark indoor environments. The character moves through a deteriorating apartment building hallway, descends into a basement mechanical room with pipes and tanks, and eventually meets a female companion named Maria.

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously down a dimly lit hallway, illuminating the walls with a flashlight

entered.detail: wooden bench against the right wall near the start of the hallway
framed artwork hanging on the left wall
doorway at the end of the hallway leading to a darker area
red fire alarm mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit apartment hallway with tiled floors. A wooden bench sits against the right wall while framed pictures hang on the left. The character approaches a doorway at the end of the hall, with a flashlight illuminating the worn walls and fire safety equipment.

events.description: passes through doorway from maintained hallway into darker industrial corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through a dark narrow passage into the basement mechanical area

entered.detail: large metal pipe running along the left wall
bare concrete walls showing water damage and deterioration

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the maintained hallway into a darker, industrial corridor with concrete walls and exposed piping. The lighting becomes significantly darker as the character approaches the mechanical room.

scene_state.functional_zone: basement mechanical room with water tanks

events.description: enters large mechanical room containing water heaters and industrial equipment
character turns to examine the large cylindrical tanks and surrounding pipes

agents.ego_description: cautiously exploring the mechanical room, examining large cylindrical tanks and pipe systems with the flashlight

entered.detail: large white cylindrical water heater tank
network of metal pipes running across the ceiling
metal barrel or container on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious mechanical room filled with large white water tanks and complex pipe systems. The flashlight illuminates the industrial equipment as the character moves around the space, examining the machinery and looking for a path forward.

events.description: exits mechanical room into narrow utility corridor with exposed pipes
navigates through maze-like corridors with multiple turns

agents.ego_description: navigating through dark utility corridors, passing electrical panels and pipe junctions while searching for the exit

entered.detail: electrical control panel with switches on the right wall
large industrial valve wheel on pipe junction
set of double doors at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Leaving the mechanical room, the character enters a narrow utility corridor lined with electrical panels and pipe junctions. The path winds through the basement infrastructure toward a set of double doors visible in the distance.

events.description: passes through double doors into another corridor section
Maria appears and begins following the protagonist

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor with Maria following closely behind, maintaining a steady pace

notable_agents.action: Maria walking behind the protagonist, following him through the dark corridor

entered.detail: wooden locker or cabinet against the far wall

segments.scene_description: After passing through the double doors, the character is joined by Maria, who follows closely behind. They move together through the dim corridor toward a set of wooden lockers, the flashlight cutting through the darkness ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a domestic apartment interior into a dark, industrial basement complex. It begins in a narrow, dimly lit hallway with tiled floors and framed pictures, moving toward a doorway where a flashlight illuminates worn walls and fire safety equipment. As the character passes through the door, the environment shifts abruptly into a darker industrial corridor of concrete and exposed piping, which then opens into a spacious mechanical room filled with large white water tanks and complex machinery. The camera then winds through a narrow utility corridor lined with electrical panels and pipe junctions before passing through a set of double doors. Finally, the scene concludes as Maria joins the character, and they move together through the dim corridor toward a row of wooden lockers.
